hero.title: Premium Namkeen
hero.subtitle: Handcrafted with premium ingredients since 1996. Our timeless recipes bring the true, unchanged flavor of Indore to your home.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Customers Trust Us
whyChooseUs.subtitle: For over two decades, we have been Indore's preferred choice for authentic snacking, centered on purity and traditional craftsmanship.

brandStory.title: A Legacy of Taste Since 1996
brandStory.para1: Gokul ke Shahi Namkeen was born in the heart of Indore. What started as a small family kitchen in 1996 has grown into one of the city's most trusted destinations for authentic namkeen and traditional sweets.
brandStory.para2: Every batch is made with select premium ingredients, honoring the recipes passed down through generations. We believe in quality you can taste and traditions you can trust.

testimonials.title: What Our Families Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real reviews from families across India who trust Gokul Namkeen for daily snacking and festive gifting.

cta.title: Experience the True
cta.subtitle: Whether it's a daily snack or a festive gift, bring home the purity of Shahi Namkeen handcrafted with love.

footer.tagline: Authentic handcrafted namkeen & sweets from Indore — made with premium quality since 1996.
